title: Clarion Science Fiction and Fantasy Writers’ Workshop
description: Clarion Science Fiction and Fantasy Writers’ Workshop is a selective writing-development program offering eligible writers workshops, mentorship, residency time, or routes toward publication administered by Clarion Foundation.
eligibility: Applicants must meet the current discipline, career stage, geography, project ownership, application window, and program-specific requirements.
value: Craft development, editorial feedback, literary community access, and program-specific scholarships or publishing connections
